caption:
Zot business dan Moris merit plis ki enn Facebook page. 🇲🇺

Eski ou ti konn ki 70%+ des Mauriciens rod bizness lor Google avant de contact? Si ou pas la, ou rate ces clients la.

bienzoli build website rapid, propre, ki vinn bien lor Google.
- 48 er pou Flic en Flac (Rs 8,000)
- 3 zour pou Port Louis (Rs 18,000)
- 5–7 zour pou Grand Baie (Rs 35,000)

Mensualite disponib. Mo ti kapav discuss ar twa azordi si ou intéressé.

DM nou 👇 ou visit bienzoli.com

#bienzoli #MauritiusDigital #WebsiteMoris #BusinessMoris

templateData.englishSubtitle: 70%+ of Mauritians search Google before contacting a business. If you're not there, you're invisible to most of your market.
